domestic.title: Kashmir Retreat
domestic.overview: Kashmir — the crown jewel of India. Drift on Dal Lake in a shikara, stay in a luxury houseboat, walk through meadows of wildflowers in Pahalgam, and ride the gondola to snow-capped peaks at Gulmarg. This 6-day retreat is a celebration of nature's finest canvas.
highlights: Luxury houseboat stay on Dal Lake
Gulmarg Gondola to Kongdori — Himalayan panoramas
Betaab Valley picnic in Pahalgam
Mughal gardens: Shalimar Bagh & Nishat Bagh
Shikara sunrise ride on Dal Lake

itinerary.title: Arrive Srinagar
activities: Airport pickup & houseboat check-in on Dal Lake

itinerary.title: Srinagar Sights
activities: Shalimar Bagh & Nishat Bagh Mughal Gardens

itinerary.title: Pahalgam
activities: Drive to Pahalgam along Lidder River

domestic.title: Andaman Paradise
domestic.overview: The Andaman Islands are India's most pristine tropical escape — powder-white beaches, electric-blue waters, and coral reefs teeming with exotic marine life. Hop between islands to discover secluded coves, snorkel with sea turtles, and dive into history at the colonial Cellular Jail.
highlights: Radhanagar Beach — rated Asia's best beach
Snorkeling at Elephant Beach, Havelock
Glass-bottom boat reef tour
Cellular Jail light & sound show
Sea walk on the ocean floor

itinerary.title: Arrive Port Blair
activities: Cellular Jail light & sound show evening

itinerary.title: Havelock Marine Life
activities: Sea walk experience on ocean floor

domestic.title: Kerala Backwaters
domestic.overview: Kerala's backwaters are a world apart — a serene network of palm-fringed canals, mirror-still lakes, and lush paddy fields. Drift through this tranquil paradise on a traditional houseboat, spot kingfishers skimming the water, and let the gentle rhythm of Kerala wash away all your worries.
highlights: Houseboat cruise on Vembanad Lake
Kathakali classical dance performance in Kochi
Chinese fishing nets at Fort Kochi sunrise
Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary walk
Ayurveda massage at a lakeside spa

itinerary.title: Arrive Kochi
activities: Fort Kochi: Chinese fishing nets & Dutch Palace

itinerary.title: Alleppey Houseboat
activities: Drive to Alleppey & board luxury houseboat
Overnight stay with fresh Kerala meals

domestic.title: Himachal Mountains
domestic.overview: The Himachal highlands are a playground for adventure lovers — towering snow-capped peaks, lush pine forests, and adrenaline-pumping activities around every turn. From Shimla's colonial charm to Manali's glaciers and Dalhousie's misty hills, this 6-day mountain journey rejuvenates mind, body, and soul.
highlights: Rohtang Pass snow fields near Manali
Solang Valley: skiing, zorbing & cable car
Shimla's colonial Mall Road & Ridge
Dalhousie's Khajjiar — India's mini Switzerland
River rafting on the Beas River

itinerary.title: Arrive Shimla
activities: Mall Road & The Ridge evening walk

itinerary.title: Shimla to Manali
activities: Drive to Manali via Kullu Valley

domestic.title: Goa Getaway
domestic.overview: Goa — India's beach paradise where golden sands meet vibrant nightlife, Portuguese heritage, and phenomenal seafood. Whether you're chasing adventure with water sports, exploring spice plantations, or simply lounging by the sea with a drink in hand, Goa never disappoints.
highlights: Parasailing & jet-ski at Calangute Beach
Old Goa's Basilica of Bom Jesus (UNESCO)
Spice plantation tour & Goan lunch
Sunset cruise on the Mandovi River
Dudhsagar Waterfall trek

itinerary.title: North Goa Action
activities: Water sports: parasailing, jet-ski, banana boat

itinerary.title: Heritage & Nature
activities: Old Goa churches: Basilica of Bom Jesus
Spice plantation tour & traditional Goan lunch

domestic.title: Rajasthan Explorer
domestic.overview: Rajasthan is India's most spectacular state — a land of mighty forts, ornate palaces, and the vast Thar Desert. Journey through the Pink City of Jaipur, the Golden City of Jaisalmer, and the City of Lakes, Udaipur. Every corner tells a story of royal splendour and timeless tradition.
highlights: Amber Fort — a Rajput masterpiece
Camel safari at Sam Sand Dunes, Jaisalmer
Lake Pichola boat ride at sunset, Udaipur
Hawa Mahal & Johari Bazaar shopping
Traditional Rajasthani folk dinner with puppetry

itinerary.title: Jaipur Pink City
activities: Jal Mahal photo stop & City Palace

itinerary.title: Desert Safari
activities: Rajasthani folk music at desert camp

itinerary.title: Fly Udaipur & Departure
activities: Lake Pichola boat ride & City Palace

international.title: Maldives Dream
international.overview: The Maldives is the world's most romantic island destination — a mosaic of tropical lagoons, white coral beaches, and overwater bungalows that seem to float above the turquoise sea. Snorkel with manta rays, indulge in world-class spa treatments, and watch the stars reflect in the lagoon from your private deck.
highlights: Overwater bungalow with private lagoon access
Manta ray & whale shark snorkeling
Couples' spa with ocean views
Sandbank sunset picnic
Glass-bottom kayaking over coral reefs

international.title: Bali Soul
international.overview: Bali is the Island of the Gods — and once you visit, you'll understand why. From Ubud's artistic soul and sacred rice terraces to Seminyak's world-class beach clubs and Balinese temple ceremonies, Bali delivers an impossibly rich blend of spiritual beauty and tropical luxury.
highlights: Tegallalang rice terrace sunrise walk
Tanah Lot temple at sunset
Kecak fire dance at Uluwatu cliff
Traditional Balinese cooking class
Mount Batur sunrise hike

itinerary.title: Temple Day
activities: Tanah Lot sea temple at sunset

international.title: Thailand Adventure
international.overview: Thailand is the land of smiles, and its diversity is breathtaking. Discover Bangkok's glittering temples and street food lanes, trek through Chiang Mai's jungle and meet elephants, then relax on Phuket's powdery beaches with emerald-green island hopping.
highlights: Ethical elephant sanctuary in Chiang Mai
Grand Palace & Wat Pho reclining Buddha
Phi Phi Islands day trip by speedboat
Authentic Thai cooking class
Floating market experience

itinerary.title: Arrive Bangkok
activities: Khao San Road & Wat Pho evening

itinerary.title: Chiang Mai
activities: Thai cooking class with local chef

international.title: Vietnam Escape
international.overview: Vietnam is a country that captivates every sense — from Hanoi's ancient temples and French colonial charm to Halong Bay's legendary limestone karsts and Ho Chi Minh City's electric energy. This 7-day journey through Vietnam's greatest hits will leave you wanting more.
highlights: Halong Bay overnight cruise (UNESCO World Heritage)
Cu Chi Tunnels, Ho Chi Minh City
Hanoi's Old Quarter street food tour
Mekong Delta boat journey
Hoi An Ancient Town lanterns

itinerary.title: Arrive Hanoi
activities: Hoan Kiem Lake & Ngoc Son Temple
Old Quarter street food evening tour

itinerary.title: Halong Bay Cruise
activities: Drive to Halong Bay & board cruise

itinerary.title: Halong & Fly South
activities: Sunrise on the bay & final cruise
Flight to Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Hoi An
activities: Flight to Da Nang, transfer to Hoi An

international.title: Dubai Opulence
international.overview: Dubai is where records are broken daily — tallest building, largest mall, most extravagant experiences. But beyond the superlatives lies a city with genuine warmth, incredible food, and an Abu Dhabi that houses one of the world's most magnificent mosques.
highlights: Burj Khalifa 'At the Top' SKY observation deck
Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, Abu Dhabi
Red Dune desert safari & Bedouin camp
Dubai Mall & Dubai Fountain show
Gold & Spice Souk in Old Dubai

itinerary.title: Arrive Dubai
activities: Dinner at a modern Arabian restaurant

itinerary.title: Dubai Icons
activities: Burj Khalifa At the Top observation deck
Desert safari: dune bashing, camel ride, BBQ dinner

itinerary.title: Old Dubai & Cruise
activities: Dhow cruise dinner on Dubai Creek

international.title: Singapore Marvel
international.overview: Singapore is a city-state that punches far above its weight — an immaculate urban garden where futuristic architecture meets lush tropical greenery, hawker centres serve world-class food, and every neighbourhood tells a different cultural story.
highlights: Gardens by the Bay & Cloud Forest conservatory
Marina Bay Sands SkyPark observation
Universal Studios Singapore on Sentosa Island
Clarke Quay & Singapore River cruise
Hawker food trail: chicken rice, laksa, chilli crab

itinerary.title: Arrive Singapore
activities: Hotel check-in at Marina Bay area
Marina Bay Sands & Helix Bridge evening

itinerary.title: Gardens & Culture
activities: Gardens by the Bay & Cloud Forest
Hawker Centre food trail at Maxwell Food Centre
